request: Draft a reply agreeing to move our call to Thursday and asking for a Zoom link.
thread:

Subject: Our call

Hi — can we move our Tuesday call to Thursday afternoon? Also I'll send a Zoom link.
style: Thanks for the note — Thursday works great on my end.
